race.description: Magic Millions Country Boosted Showcase Hcp (C2)
race.comment: BRAZEN CRIME (1) will be hoping they roll along up front and if they do he'll be one of the strongest late. If he's not spotting them too big a start on the turn, he can give them a real scare. SPREAD THE LOVE (4) looks one of the main pace influences. Dropped out quickly here last time but is more than capable of bouncing back. ZOU FORCE (9) made good progress to win the maiden at this track in just the second appearance last time out. Has scope for further improvement so could work through the grades now. BELNERA (10) draws well and must be respected after putting a string of wins and placings together.
